parser_claim: The active runtime recognizes exactly NP + 同 + NP as CoordinatedNP and assigns NP/topic/object affordances.
exact_locator: main.js category template and fallback around CoordinatedNP
source_proposition: The parser has a bounded three-part 同 template; the label is absent from the 545-case accepted regression snapshot.
implementation_effect: Retain this only as internal provenance while testing marker inventory, ambiguity, and external role assignment.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer productivity, standard node status, or accepted-fixture validation from code.

parser_claim: Cantonese nominal phrases may be explicitly coordinated with 同 or 同埋 and may also be juxtaposed without an overt conjunction.
source_proposition: Wong states that phrases can use 同埋 or 同 and are often juxtaposed; 蘋果同橙 and 衫褲鞋襪 illustrate the two profiles.
implementation_effect: Split overt 同, overt 同埋, and unmarked juxtaposition rather than treating NP+同+NP as the whole coordination system.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every adjacent NP sequence is coordination or that all conjunction choices are freely interchangeable.

parser_claim: Conjunctive 同 has a compound form 同埋 and is distinct from other uses of 同.
exact_locator: user PDF conjunction section; examples 我同佢一齊上廣州 and 香港同澳門; 同埋 discussion
source_proposition: The coursebook explicitly describes conjunction 同, gives nominal conjunct examples, and notes the compound 同埋 while preserving use restrictions.
implementation_effect: Preserve overt marker identity and do not normalize 同埋 to 同.
forbidden_inference: Do not use a pedagogical explanation to establish exhaustive distribution or unrestricted adult productivity.

parser_claim: The surface token 同 is polyfunctional and does not establish coordination by itself.
exact_locator: book pp. 17-18; preposition examples 26 and conjunction examples 32-33
source_proposition: The same source separately illustrates prepositional/comitative 同 and conjunction 同.
implementation_effect: Require structural context to distinguish coordinator from coverb/comitative material.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify every 同 between nominals as a coordinator or every 同 before a predicate as conjunction.

parser_claim: A coordinated NP should be role-neutral internally; subject, object, and topic status come from the containing clause.
exact_locator: main.js output slots and comparison with surrounding NP composition
source_proposition: The runtime places NP/topic/object affordances on the coordination node even though the sources establish coordination rather than clause role.
implementation_effect: Keep conjuncts and coordinator visible; assign clause role from external attachment.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer objecthood or topichood from coordination itself.

parser_claim: The source-backed core is nominal coordination, but the runtime requires marker and ambiguity splits before any implementation change.
source_proposition: Exact NP+同+NP is a bounded subtype within a larger system containing 同埋 and juxtaposition, with 同 ambiguity.
implementation_effect: Narrow and split rather than promote the current umbrella.
forbidden_inference: Do not change parser behavior during the research freeze.

parser_claim: NominalModifierNP is a dormant registry label with no active template, fallback, or accepted regression occurrence.

parser_claim: Cantonese nominal modification includes both 嘅-marked and restricted bare prenominal modifiers.
source_proposition: Adjectives, possessors, relative clauses, and nominal complements can occur in 嘅-marked modification; selected bare modifiers are separately attested.
implementation_effect: Preserve overt 嘅 and bare-modifier subtypes rather than a single generic nominal-modifier node.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer unrestricted bare modification, a single lexical category, or a silent noun.

parser_claim: Classifier-linked possessive and demonstrative patterns form nominal structures distinct from generic modifier+noun adjacency.
source_proposition: Yu illustrates nominal order, possessive classifier phrases, demonstrative-classifier phrases, and headless classifier NPs.
implementation_effect: Keep classifier-based relations in their sourced nominal subtypes.
forbidden_inference: Do not use an unpublished analysis as sole authority or collapse classifier and 嘅 structures.

parser_claim: The externally supported modifier families have different overt markers, head relations, interpretations, and ellipsis conditions.
source_proposition: Bare, 嘅-marked, headed, and headless expressions differ in distribution and interpretation.
implementation_effect: Maintain subtype-specific nodes already mapped in R11 and R5.
forbidden_inference: Do not create one productive cross-product of arbitrary modifier and head noun.

parser_claim: The dormant label overlaps active ModifiedNP, ModifierNP, AssociativeNP, RelativeClauseNP, StativeNominalComplement, and classifier-NP analyses.

parser_claim: Cantonese ordinals with 第 can function as determiners.

implementation_effect: Preserve 第 and numeral identity as overt ordinal material.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer exhaustive ordinal syntax or adopt the annotation scheme as parser ontology.

parser_claim: A 第 ordinal may occur with a classifier while the nominal head is omitted.

implementation_effect: Split overt-head and classifier-headed noun-ellipsis profiles; retain context requirement without inserting a noun.
forbidden_inference: Do not require an overt head noun or invent the omitted referent.

parser_claim: The lexical string 第二 also has nonordinal Hong Kong Cantonese uses meaning next, another, or other.

source_proposition: The coursebook explicitly says these 第二 nominal structures do not express ordinal sequencing.
implementation_effect: Require contextual and nominal evidence before assigning an ordinal relation.
forbidden_inference: Do not label every 第二 as “second” or treat lexicalized next/other uses as ordinals.

parser_claim: The runtime conflates true ordinal determination, classifier-headed ellipsis, and lexicalized 第二 sequence/alternative meanings.

parser_claim: OrdinalClassifierNP requires subtype and lexical-sense splits before retention.
